title: ONAP Release Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest of all components in an ONAP release

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the manifest schema. The canonical value is defined by the MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION constant in onap_release_map.models.manifest; update this example in lockstep when that constant is bumped.

tool_version.description: Version of onap-release-map that generated this manifest

oom_branch.description: Git branch of the OOM repo that was analyzed

oom_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the OOM repo

repositories.description: All Gerrit repositories in the release

docker_images.description: All Docker images deployed in the release

helm_components.description: All Helm chart components parsed from the OOM umbrella and its sub-charts

provenance.description: Metadata about how this manifest was generated

validation.description: Optional post-collection validation report. Populated by validators such as the mapping audit. When no validators ran, this field serialises as null (not omitted) via the standard model exporters, preserving a stable top-level shape for consumers. Added in schema version 1.2.0.

confidence.description: Confidence that this repo is in the release

in_current_release.description: Whether this repository is included in the current ONAP release

is_parent_project.description: Whether this Gerrit project is a parent containing sub-projects

docker_images.description: Docker images built from this repo

helm_charts.description: Helm charts that deploy images from this repo
Helm charts that reference this image

nexus_validated.description: Whether the image:tag was verified in Nexus

attribution_reason.description: Serialised MappingReason describing how the image was resolved to its Gerrit project (e.g. 'override', 'leaf-match-namespace', 'heuristic-dash-verified', 'unresolved'). Null when the image record predates attribution observability.

attribution_verified.description: Tri-state verification flag. True when gerrit_project was confirmed present in Gerrit ground truth. False in two sub-cases that should be interpreted by also reading gerrit_project: (a) when gerrit_project is a non-null path that the mapper could not verify against ground truth (e.g. an unverified heuristic fallback or a stale override), and (b) when gerrit_project is null because no candidate matched (attribution_reason 'unresolved'), which carries false as the absence of a verified result rather than as a rejection. Null only when no ground truth was available at resolution time, so verification was impossible to determine either way. Consumers should always read this field together with gerrit_project and attribution_reason rather than treating false as a single signal.

attribution_alternatives.description: Other plausible Gerrit project paths considered but not chosen by the longest-match tiebreak. Empty when the mapper had a single candidate or did not run.

ValidationReport.description: Aggregated output of a single validator run.

validator.description: Identifier of the validator that produced the report (e.g. 'mapping_audit').

passed.description: True when the report contains no ERROR-level findings.

summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary suitable for CLI output.

counts.description: Per-severity and per-category counts keyed as 'severity:NAME' and 'category:NAME' for quick stats without iterating findings.

findings.description: Ordered list of findings: errors first, then warnings, then info; within each severity level sorted by category then image for deterministic output.

ValidationFinding.description: A single audit finding produced by a validator.

severity.description: How serious the finding is. ERROR blocks CI when --strict-validation is set; WARNING and INFO never block.

image.description: Docker image reference the finding concerns, if applicable.

current_mapping.description: Gerrit project path the manifest currently records.

suggested_mapping.description: Alternative mapping the validator recommends, when known.

alternatives.description: Other plausible candidates considered during resolution.

detail.description: Optional free-form detail fields for category-specific context.

name.description: Chart name from the umbrella dependency or a nested sub-chart (e.g. policy, policy-api)

condition_key.description: Helm values key that enables this component

docker_images.description: All Docker images deployed by this component

gerrit_projects.description: All Gerrit projects contributing to this component
